markdown:
#  Navigate to a Project from Your Free Procore Account 
##### Limited Release
[Free Procore accounts](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/free-procore-account/tutorials/create-a-free-procore-company-account) are currently only available in the United States and Canada.
##  Background 
If you are already logged in to your Procore Construction Network account and want to navigate to a project in Procore's web application, you can quickly navigate to that project without needing to log in to Procore separately.
##  Things to Consider 
  * [Required User Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/free-procore-account/permissions)


##  Steps 
  * Navigate to a Project in Procore
  * Navigate to a Tool in a Procore Project


#### Navigate to a Project in Procore
  1. Log in to your free Procore account.
  2. Click one of your 'Recent Projects'.  
OR  
Click **View all Projects** or **Projects** in the sidebar to see all projects.
    1. _Optional:_ Use the **Search** bar or click the **Filter** menu to quickly locate a project if necessary. See [View Projects from Your Procore Construction Network Account](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/free-procore-account/tutorials/view-projects-from-your-free-procore-account).
    2. Click the name of the project.


#### Navigate to a Specific Tool in a Procore Project
  1. Log in to your free Procore account.
  2. Click one of your 'Recent Projects'.  
OR  
Click **View all Projects** or **Projects** in the sidebar to see all projects.
  3. _Optional:_ Use the **Search** bar or click the **Filter** menu to quickly locate a project if necessary.
  4. Click the **Quick Links** drop-down menu next to a project to select a specific tool to navigate to in Procore.  



## See Also
  * [View Projects from Your Free Procore Account](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/free-procore-account/tutorials/view-projects-from-your-free-procore-account)
  * [Navigate to a Company from Your Free Procore Account](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/free-procore-account/tutorials/navigate-to-a-company-from-your-free-procore-account)
  * [Indicate Your Intention to Bid from your Free Procore Account](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/free-procore-account/tutorials/indicate-your-intention-to-bid-from-your-free-procore-account)
title: Navigate to a Project from Your Free Procore Account
description: How to navigate to a project in Procore's web application directly from your free Procore account.
